# PrivacyPreferencesPolicyControl.Services

**Device Management Profile**

The privacy policy control services dictionary that controls access on a per app basis.

## Declaration

```swift
object PrivacyPreferencesPolicyControl.Services
```

## Objects

- **PrivacyPreferencesPolicyControl.Services.Identity**: A dictionary listing apps and the privacy policy to apply to them.

items.description: A dictionary listing apps and the privacy policy to apply to them.
items.name: PrivacyPreferencesPolicyControl.Services.Identity
